findings.evidence: `rg` shows `lemma fundamentalGroupGenerator_zpow` at lines 59-61 and `lemma fundamentalGroupGenerator_pow` at lines 73-75 with no preceding `@[simp]`; analogous power transport lemmas in `TauCeti/AlgebraicTopology/UniversalCover/Deck/Fiber.lean:113` and `:121` are marked `@[simp]`.
findings.fix: Add `@[simp]` to the integer and natural power normal-form lemmas if they do not loop; keep the existing `*_eq_one_iff` simp lemmas for the proposition-valued goals.
findings.issue: `fundamentalGroupGenerator_zpow` and `fundamentalGroupGenerator_pow` are the characteristic normal forms for powers of the new public generator, but neither is marked `@[simp]`, so users must manually rewrite to use the advertised power API.

summary: The exposed generator surface is mostly scoped to the roadmap target, but its main power normal forms are not registered for automation.
